tooltip: Select Ganon as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Ganon focuses on improving Giant and Trash units.
Allows you to summon Ganon, a giant, ancient, and terrible sorcerer.
Summon Lynelblin, twisted Cavalry units created by Ganon's sorcery and Goomas, terrifying siege creatures.
Summon Dodoblin Squaddies and Durpyblin Defenders, cheap Infantry that synergize with each other.
Access to Bar, economic building and smart-science-guys, a research building.
